creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
Created attachment 225167
Patch

Update:
https://gajim.org/downloads/1.3/

News:
https://gajim.org/post/2021-04-24-gajim-1.3.2-released/

* Added Python runtime dependency for the OpenPGP plugin
* Build was failing in phase patch-depends:
Missing license file for GPLv3 in /wrkdirs/usr/ports/net-im/gajim/work/gajim-1.3/COPYING
*** Error code 1

I changed ${WRCSRC} to point to the correct directory gajim-1.3.2/ instead of gajim-1.3/
